chunks.title: The King's Feast and Vashti's Banquet
chunks.reason: Describes the grand feast held by King Ahasuerus and the separate feast for women.

chunks.title: Vashti Refuses the King's Call
chunks.reason: Narrates the king's command to bring Vashti and her refusal.

chunks.title: The King Consults His Advisors
chunks.reason: Contains the king's question to his wise men and Memucan's detailed argument.

chunks.title: The Decree is Issued
chunks.reason: Describes the king's acceptance of the advice and the sending of letters to all provinces.
